name: Internal Account Phishing Response
description: Responds to phishing emails originating from internal (compromised) accounts. When an internal user account sends phishing emails, this playbook immediately disables the account via Active Directory, performs a mailbox sweep to identify all phishing messages sent from the account, quarantines those messages from recipient mailboxes, and notifies both the SOC and the affected user's manager. Includes AI analysis to assess whether the account compromise extends beyond email.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Sweep and quarantine phishing emails sent from compromised account

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify SOC and management of compromised internal account

data.title: Internal Phishing Alert
data.summary: Triggers when phishing email originates from an internal account

data.title: AI Compromise Assessment
data.summary: Assess the scope of account compromise and phishing indicators

config.custom_instructions: Assess internal account compromise: analyze sent phishing email content, determine if the account was taken over via credential theft or session hijack, look for signs of lateral movement or data access beyond email

data.title: Approve Account Disable
data.summary: SOC analyst must approve disabling the internal user account

config.message: Internal account {{$.trigger.alert.sender}} is sending phishing emails. AI assessment: {{$.nodes.analyze-1.result.summary}}. Approve disabling the account?

data.title: Disable Account
data.summary: Disable the compromised internal account in Active Directory

config.message: Disabling compromised account {{$.trigger.alert.sender}} — sending phishing emails internally

data.title: Identify Sent Phishing Emails
data.summary: Query for all phishing emails sent by the compromised account

data.title: Quarantine Sent Phishing Emails
data.summary: Remove all phishing emails sent by the compromised account from recipient mailboxes

config.message: Quarantining {{$.nodes.code-1.result.email_count}} phishing email(s) sent by {{$.nodes.code-1.result.compromised_user}} from {{$.nodes.code-1.result.recipient_count}} recipient mailboxes

data.title: Notify SOC & Management
data.summary: Alert SOC team and compromised user's manager

data.title: End — Account Contained
data.summary: Compromised account disabled, phishing emails quarantined, teams notified

config.summary: Internal compromised account disabled, all sent phishing emails quarantined, SOC and management notified.
